rationale: All 5 AC are satisfied. Svelte cell renders one of unchanged/delta/transaction-unavailable/active-only states with correct data-*-changed attributes; new Playwright test exercises read|create|update|patch|delete across visible subjects, asserts decision/redacted/denied/diagnostic deltas using both proposedPolicyDraftDenyHigh and proposedPolicyDraftBroken, verifies 'unchanged' literal, and conditionally checks the transaction affordance. Notes capture green test counts (7 passed) plus typecheck/lint/unit/cargo evidence.

findings.summary: biome-ignore comment used to retain the CellDelta type import that is only referenced inside the template; acceptable but worth a future linter rule pass.

matrixDeltaDraft mutates a copy of proposedPolicyDraftDenyHigh to add redact/deny/contractor-read rules — ensures the test deterministically exercises decisionChanged, redactedFieldsChanged, and deniedFieldsChanged flags.
Transaction-unavailable assertion is guarded by count()>0, matching the bead's note that transaction-row support is queued separately; acceptable per AC1/AC2 wording ('if rendered').
